unit.scope: Full client vitest suite (118 files). Includes 6 new resolveTaskPhase tests in client/src/lib/phaseStyle.test.ts covering new-plain -> null, persisted phase+phaseLabel wins, new-iterate -> Iterate regardless of title (regression), persisted phase wins over actionId default, title fallback for non-iterate actions, and phase-without-phaseLabel falls through (not persisted).

e2e.scope: Trivial-bug UI logic change in client/src/lib/phaseStyle.ts + 2 component consumers. Behavior is covered by direct unit tests on the helper and existing component-level phase-badge tests (TaskCard.test.tsx, TaskDetailHeader.test.tsx, 65 tests across both) which all stayed green. No new UI surface, no server / API / store contract change -> Playwright re-run not required for trivial.

smoke.scope: No server / dev-server change; client-only TS render-policy fix.

surface_verification.justification: Pure client-side TypeScript pure-function + two memoised render-policy call-sites. No backend route, no SSE/WS handler, no store mutation, no message contract, no env/JSON/IO/network boundary touched. Boundary-affects-frontend rule does not apply (the change IS the frontend). Trivial complexity matrix row allows surface=none.

degraded.reason: Host client/node_modules junctioned from main worktree to avoid duplicating ~250 MB install; oxlint binary is not installed in host node_modules (npm omitted the platform-binary at some point). Ran `npx --yes oxlint@1.66.0` on the four touched files instead - only pre-existing warning on phaseStyle.test.ts:56 (a `.toBeUndefined;` without `()` from the v0.4.1 commit) surfaced; nothing introduced by this iterate. Re-installing oxlint in the host is out of scope for a trivial bugfix.
